market_info.title: Will the next Prime Minister of Hungary be Viktor Orbán?

forecast.reasoning: AI predicts 60% YES (market: 36%) • Based on the above, the outcome is more likely to be No, with Péter Magyar becoming the next Prime Minister. • The evidence favors a No outcome due to Magyar's significant lead in the polls and the current socio-economic challenges facing Hungary, which may drive voters to seek change. • However, the case is not overwhelmingly strong, as Fidesz's historical dominance and electoral advantages present significant hurdles for the opposition.

market_info.title: Will Manchester City win the 2025–26 English Premier League?

forecast.reasoning: AI predicts 20% YES (market: 8%) • Based on the above, the outcome that Arsenal wins the league is more likely. • The evidence favors a No outcome for Manchester City, as Arsenal currently leads the standings and has shown strong form. • Manchester City, while capable of a late-season surge, faces a challenging fixture list and needs Arsenal to falter significantly. ======================================================================
